IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdBusiness.description: Id of the business related to the ressource.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

ReferenceDiscount.description: Shared Key of the Feature between ProAbono and your application.

StateDiscount.description:
Status of the Feature (Draft, Enabled)

| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| Draft | ... |
| Enabled | ... |
StateDiscount.title: DiscountStatus

TargetFee.description:
Type of the Feature (Draft, Enabled)
| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| FlatFee | ... |
| FeatureFee | ... |
| UpfrontFee | ... |
| AllRecurring | ... |
| All | ... |
TargetFee.title: TargetFee

ValueOff.description: Discount value — in cents if TypeOff is Flat, in basis points if TypeOff is PerTenThousand (e.g. 1000 = 10%).

TypeOff.description:
Type off of the discount (Flat,PerTenThousand)

| Status | Description |
|---|---|
| Flat | ... |
| PerTenThousand | ... |
TypeOff.title: TypeOff

CountPeriods.description: Number of billing periods the discount applies; absent means unlimited.

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

422.description: Request syntax is correct, but its content is not. The response body contains an array of errors describing exactly where the problems are.

Message.description: A message localized in your language.
